name: Menu Button
description: A button that opens a menu, typically styled with a downward-pointing arrow to indicate that activation will display a list of menu choices.

keyboard_interactions.action: Opens the menu and places focus on the first menu item
Opens the menu and places focus on the first menu item
(Optional) Opens the menu and focuses the first item
(Optional) Opens the menu and focuses the last item

required_attributes.description: true when menu is displayed; false when hidden

notes: Menu items follow the menu/menubar pattern for keyboard interaction
When the menu closes, focus returns to the button
